videos.title: The art of noticing (colour walk) 🌼
videos.description:
A few months back, we were exploring Sydney with our little one. It was summer in Australia, so we spent a lot of time outside, and each day Robin and I would choose a colour to notice as we walked 🌈

As a professional over-thinker (hi hi!), it became such a great way for me to get out of my head and pay closer attention to what was around us. Tiny flowers, painted walls, someone’s jacket… little things I might have otherwise missed 🐝

It’s such a simple little mindfulness activity. Try it the n

videos.title: THIS is how you do tofu
videos.description:
📲 TRY OUR APP: pickuplimes.com/app (or search "Pick Up Limes" on the app store)

👀 Find this “Peanut-Chili Silken Tofu” recipe in our app to scale the amounts, get step-by-step photo instructions, and find detailed nutrition info. Or find it below:

INGREDIENTS
~ For 2 servings ~
Tofu
* 14 oz silken tofu
Peanut-chili sauce
* 3 Tbsp peanut butter
* 1½ Tbsp reduced-sodium soy sauce
* 1 Tbsp rice vinegar
* 1 Tbsp maple syrup
* ½ Tbsp chili crisp
* ½ Tbsp toasted sesame oil
Toppings
* 1 Tbsp salted

INGREDIENTS
~ For 2 servings ~

Shaken iced coffee
- 1 cup ice cubes

- ¼ cup water
- 2 Tbsp light brown sugar
- ½ tsp pure vanilla extract
- ¼ tsp ground cinnamon

Assembly
- 1 cup ice cubes
- 1½ cups unsweetened oat mi

videos.title: It’s finally here… Simply Plants 🌿
videos.description:
I’ve written a cookbook! Pick Up Limes fiiiinally has a cookbook!! Eeeeek!

It’s called SIMPLY PLANTS and it’s officially available for pre-order (!!) 🥹📖🌿 Link pinned in the comments to preorder ✨

For over 6 years, I’ve been secretly stashing away some of our most loved recipes, saving them especially for this: the day we could include them all in a cookbook. All the recipes were crafted with everyday ingredients, are simple to make, and are so delicious that you’ll want to come back to them ag

videos.title: What I’ve been secretly working on | Simply Plants
videos.description:
It feels surreal to finally share this cookbook with you. SIMPLY PLANTS is officially available for pre-order (!!) 🥹📖🌿 https://www.pickuplimes.com/book/simply-plants/

This is a true pinch me moment 🤏 This book has been years in the making and sooooo much love has gone into it, from the recipe development and testing to the writing and photography, and I feel incredibly grateful to finally be able to share it with you.

My hope with this book is to make eating more plants feel easier and more en

videos.title: 10-ingredient HIGH PROTEIN soup 🥣
videos.description:
📲 TRY OUR APP: pickuplimes.com/app (or search "Pick Up Limes" on the app store)

Find this Hearty Kale ‘Sausage’ Soup recipe in our Pick Up Limes app to scale the amounts, get step-by-step photo instructions, and find detailed nutrition info. Or find it below:

INGREDIENTS
~ For 4 servings ~
* ½ Tbsp olive oil
* 1 medium onion, finely chopped
* 2 garlic cloves, crushed
* 2 medium potatoes, cut into 1 cm cubes†
* 2 medium tomatoes, chopped
* 1 medium carrot, finely chopped
* 4 cups vegetable brot

videos.title: The comfort trap
videos.description:
📲 TRY OUR APP: pickuplimes.com/app (or search "Pick Up Limes" on the app store)

👀 Find this Potato Tot Chickpea Skillet Bake recipe in our app to scale the amounts, get step-by-step photo instructions, and find detailed nutrition info. Or find it below:

INGREDIENTS
~ For 5 servings ~

Sauce
* 2 Tbsp vegetable oil
* 1½ Tbsp all-purpose flour
* 2 cups unsweetened soy milk 
* ¼ cup (20g) nutritional yeast flakes
* 1½ vegetable bouillon cube, crushed
* ¼ tsp chili flakes (optional)
* ⅛ tsp ground
